history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with black hair and glasses is sitting at a wooden table in an outdoor cafe at night. He is wearing a black collared shirt and grey pants, with white sneakers. He has his right hand on his head, looking off to the side. The cafe is lit by string lights and hanging lamps, casting a warm glow. In the background, other patrons are seated at tables, and there are potted plants. The overall mood is relaxed and casual. The color palette consists of dark blues, blacks, whites, and warm wood tones.
